## User Story
As a store owner, I need to create a product in the catalog, so that I can make new items available to customers.

## Acceptance Criteria (Gherkin Syntax)
Given a store owner has valid product details
When they submit a request to create a product
Then a new product should be saved in the catalog and returned with a unique ID

## Story Points Estimate
- [ ] 1 - Extra Small
- [ ] 2 - Small
- [ ] 3 - Medium
- [ ] 5 - Large
- [ ] 8 - Extra Large
